name: Logo.dev

auth.notes: Image API uses publishable token query param; Describe/Brand API uses Bearer secret key.

rateLimits: Monthly request limits by plan; no per-second/minute burst limit; proactive/soft enforcement.
pagination: Image and Describe lookups are single-resource requests; Brand Search returns a maximum of 10 results and does not document cursor/offset pagination.
notes: Generated from parallel specialist scout findings.
Use source links to refresh endpoint-level details before implementation.
